trivia: Gulfstream's flagship carries the longest cabin in business aviation on Rolls-Royce Pearl engines. It flies 13,900 km nonstop, which means it can appear over your station from literally anywhere.
Five living areas, circadian lighting, and a galley bigger than some apartments: the current peak of the private jet arms race.
funFacts: The longest cabin ever fitted to a business jet.
Set multiple city-pair speed records during testing.
